data.description: China's Wu Yize beats Mark Selby to progress to snooker's World Championship quarter-finals at the Crucible

data.title: Siemens Government Technologies to Provide Electronic Security System Maintenance & Support for National Security Operations on Florida’s Space Coast
data.description: Siemens Government Technologies (SGT) has secured a competitive contract win to provide electronic security maintenance and support for national security operations at Cape Canaveral, FL. The U.S. Army Engineering and Support Center, Huntsville awarded the new task order, which could be worth up to $22.6 million if both option years are exercised. SGT will be responsible for maintaining and servicing integrated Electronic Security Systems as part of this contract.

data.title: OpenEvidence Collaborates With NCCN to Integrate Canonical Oncology Treatment Algorithms at the Point-of-Care
data.description: In Miami, OpenEvidence has announced the integration of National Comprehensive Cancer Network® (NCCN®) Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®) into their platform. This collaboration aims to provide clinicians with a valuable resource for oncology care. The platform will now offer direct access to the NCCN Guidelines®, which serve as a crucial reference for oncology practices. This integration is part of OpenEvidence's effort to enhance their services, with a particular focus on oncology. The collaboration with NCCN will involve working with top oncology experts to ensure clinicians can deliver optimal care to patients.

data.title: Forrester: The GTM Singularity Is Collapsing Traditional Go-To-Market Approaches
data.description: In a joint announcement from Phoenix and Cambridge, the latest research from Forrester (Nasdaq: FORR) has been revealed at the B2B Summit North America. Titled "The GTM Singularity Is Here," this study serves as a wake-up call for B2B executives in marketing, sales, customer success, and product roles. It urges them to abandon outdated go-to-market (GTM) strategies and adopt a new ARC (augmented, resilient, and collaborative) GTM model that resonates with modern AI-empowered consumers. This shift comes after enduring years of turbulence influenced by evolving market trends.

data.title: OKI Develops 180-Layer 15 mm-Thick PCB Technologies for Next-Generation AI Semiconductor Testing Equipment
data.description: In Tokyo, OKI Circuit Technology, a subsidiary of the OKI Group specialized in printed circuit boards (PCBs), has announced a breakthrough in technology development. The company has unveiled innovative design and production techniques for 180-layer, 15 mm-thick PCBs designed for high bandwidth memory (HBM) used in AI semiconductors. This advancement signifies a significant boost, with a 45% surge in layer count compared to previous technology, and the board thickness has approximately doubled. The new PCBs are tailored for wafer testing equipment critical in modern semiconductor technologies.

data.title: Mercury Receives OCC Conditional Approval to Establish Mercury Bank, N.A.
data.description: Mercury, a tech company offering innovative banking solutions, has been granted conditional approval by the OCC to establish Mercury Bank, N.A. This national bank will enable Mercury to provide its unique banking services directly to customers under federal oversight. The approval comes after significant effort, signaling a major milestone for the company's vision. Through Mercury Bank, customers can expect enhanced banking experiences with full regulatory compliance.

data.title: Perini Management Services, Inc. Awarded the Right to Compete for Task Orders Under $2 Billion USACE Energy Resilience and Conservation Investment Program
data.description: In FRAMINGHAM, Massachusetts, Tutor Perini Corporation (NYSE: TPC) disclosed that its subsidiary, Perini Management Services, Inc. (PMSI), has secured a construction multiple-award task order contract (MATOC) from the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers, Louisville District. The contract spans over 10 years, including a three-year base period and seven one-year optional extensions, with a combined capacity of $2 billion. Tutor Perini Corporation is a prominent construction firm specializing in civil, building, and specialty construction projects.
AB Science reaches agreement on repayment terms with all financial creditors, finalizing renegotiation of loans.

data.title: Western Union Q1 Earnings Miss, But Guidance Holds — JPMorgan Says Execution Bar Just Got Higher
data.description: Western Union Co (NYSE: WU) recorded a first-quarter adjusted earnings 30% below estimates, at $983 million in revenue, surpassing Street expectations of $961 million. Despite this, there was a 40% decline in adjusted earnings compared to the previous year. Analyst Tien-tsin Huang of JPMorgan maintained an Underweight rating and $9 price target. Management's full-year guidance remains unchanged, hinting at a potential earnings acceleration in the second half of the year. Western Union highlighted factors contributing to the miss, including lower fixed cost coverage in owned locations, timing of vendor incentives, and increased costs from new strategic partnerships. Analysts suggest monitoring future developments closely. Visit Benzinga.com for more details.
French FM says Iran must make 'major concessions' to end crisis

data.title: WestJet Flight Attendants Issue Notice of Dispute
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, Flight Attendants working for WestJet, who are represented by CUPE 8125, have officially declared a dispute after over seven months of negotiations that have not made significant headway on critical matters. CUPE 8125 stands for about 4,400 cabin crew members at WestJet mainline. The union initiated negotiations last September and has been meeting with WestJet several times every month in hopes of reaching a revised collective agreement. At the core of the conflict are important issues that have not been effectively resolved.

data.title: Kanverse.ai Named Leader in Customer Experience in 2026 ISG Buyers Guides™, Advancing Agentic AI for Finance Automation
data.description: A technology company based in San Jose, California, called Kanverse.ai, has recently achieved recognition for its AI-powered agentic automation platform. The company was acknowledged as a Leader in Customer Experience in the 2026 ISG Buyers Guide™ for Intelligent Document Processing Emerging Providers and the 2026 ISG Buyers Guide™ for Automation & Orchestration Platforms Emerging Providers, as per ISG Research. Moreover, Kanverse.ai was also rated as an Exemplary provider in the Automation & Orchestration Platforms Emerging Providers category. This recognition highlights the success of Kanverse.ai in delivering exceptional customer experience.

data.title: Aave presses Arbitrum to unlock $73M ETH held after $292M Kelp DAO hack to recover rsETH backing.
data.description: Aave is calling upon Arbitrum to release $73 million in stolen ETH to help recover from the $292 million Kelp DAO hack. The focus is on restoring support for rsETH.

data.title: Mantis Space Partners with Atomic-6 to Power and Cool Next-Generation Orbital Energy Platform
data.description: In a significant development, a groundbreaking space energy startup has chosen Light Wing™ solar arrays and Hot Wing™ radiators as pivotal technologies for its orbital power infrastructure. The company, Mantis Space, operating between Albuquerque, N.M. and Marietta, Ga., made this selection, marking an essential step in shaping the future of energy in space. The announcement was made on April 27, 2026, garnering attention towards the innovative approach adopted by the venture-backed startup. The decision underscores the importance placed on these cutting-edge technologies in revolutionizing the space energy sector.

data.title: STORY3 Capital Makes Significant New Investment in Bumble
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 27, 2026, STORY3 Capital Partners, alongside other lenders, successfully finalized a senior secured term loan facility worth $475 million for Bumble Inc. This company is known for operating top online dating and connection-oriented apps.

data.title: Triton Uranium Commences Development of The Atlas Project in Uranium City, Saskatchewan
data.description: Triton Uranium has initiated development activities at its main project, Atlas Project in Uranium City, Saskatchewan, in a move towards production. The low-cost, open-pit model is being utilized to accelerate progress. This announcement was made on April 27, 2026 in Saskatoon, SK, showing the company's commitment to advancing operations. This development signifies a key step forward for Triton Uranium as they aim to tap into the potential of the project.

data.title: SitusAMC Leads the Industry in Residential Mortgage Due Diligence in 2025
data.description: SitusAMC, a prominent company in the residential mortgage industry, has solidified its position as a key player by conducting approximately 870,000 loan scope reviews across roughly 460,000 distinct loans in 2025. Additionally, the firm provided support for about 340 rated securitizations during the same period. This highlights their role as a strategic partner for both buyers and sellers within the industry. The headquarters of SitusAMC are located in New York, and this information was reported on April 27, 2026, according to a press release.
